TITLE
	L2-07 PV Test ;

GDAT
	FILE w=tokyo_3column_SI.has ;
	RUN (6/25) 7/1-7/3 ;
	PRINT 7/1-7/3 *wd ;
*

EXSRF
	r=0.2 ;
	south a=0.0 ;
	north a=180.0 ;
	east a=90.0 ;
	west a=270.0 ;
	Hor ;
	earth Z=1.5 ;
	PVSurf a=0 t=30 r=0.15 ;
*

WALL
	-E:ExtWall RC-150 FPS-50 GPB-12 ;
	-R:Roof FPS-100 GPB-12 ;
	-F:Floor GPB-12 FPS-100 RC-150 ;
*

ROOM
	TestRoom Vol=100.0
		*s
		alc=4.6
		south: -E ExtWall 20.0 ;
		north: -E ExtWall 20.0 ;
		east: -E ExtWall 12.5 ;
		west: -E ExtWall 12.5 ;
		Hor: -R Roof 40.0 ;
		earth: -F Floor 40.0 ;
	*
*

EQPCAT
	PV PV1 KHD=0.97 KPD=0.87 KPM=0.94 KPA=0.97 EffInv=0.95 apmax=-0.01 InstallType=A ;
*

SYSCMP
	PVmodule1 -c PV1 -exs PVSurf PVcap=4000 Area=20 ;
*

SYSPTH
*
*
